content.speakerText: Hey, have you followed me on TikTok? I just posted my cooking video!
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你关注我TikTok了吗？我刚发了烹饪视频！
expectedAnswers: Already on it! Your recipe looks delicious 🍳
I haven't yet—gimme two seconds, I'm following now!
I don't do TikTok, but I saw it on your Instagram story—looks amazing!
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰回应是否已关注或计划关注
是否使用了场景相关表达（follow, gimme, saw it on story）
语气是否自然、有活力，符合社交媒体互动习惯
